title: lygoplis spinosum
intro: Lygoplis spinosum, also known as spiny woodruff, is a flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Lygoplis spinosum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve anxiety and stress, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lygoplis spinosum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
